reviews.review_text:
Had this game on switch, got it again on steam

this is peak pizza platforming perfection

‎(Beatboxing seriously while waiting patiently for the pizza delivery!)
‎
‎Now this is what a true indie game really shines!
‎Honest to goodness existence that without a doubt make the headlines.
‎Clean reviews from most of the REAL gamers, not fabricated ones from those repulsive fakers aka self-proclaimers.
‎
‎Unlike the one who recently got 10 out of 10 from IGN.
‎What the (bleep), man!
‎It is the same BS, all over again.
‎How long must we stand and do nothing at all?
‎While the fakes take the fun and we take the fall?
‎They snatch up the joy and dictate what we do,
‎Controlling our thoughts and corrupting our view.
‎
‎The solution is simple: never bow down and simply surrender.
‎Forget about that nepo game, it's a total pretender.
‎Grab Pizza Tower for maximum fun.
‎Satisfaction guaranteed won't let you feel undone!
‎Oh, bless their hearts, they tried to lie,
‎But that industry plant just won't fly.
‎Don't waste your precious, fading breath
‎On trends that bore us half to death.
‎Act now and go buy Pizza Tower instead,
‎And save the last brain cell in your head.
‎You won't spend life in deep remorse,
‎Unless you hate fun, then of course!
‎
‎Enough is enough! Time to take a firm stand and defend.
‎Fight back the self-proclaimers, who never play the game.
‎We gamers must unite right now, this farce is such a shame.
‎Stand up and join the battle, don't let our true gaming spirits die in vain.
‎Just like my homie 
‎Carl "CJ" Johnson said reluctantly, 
‎Ah-(Bleep)! Here we go again...
‎
‎No real indie studios can’t afford
‎A goodie bag with hush-hush bribes on board.
‎The shady devs claim indie pride
‎But look at all the gifts inside.
‎A swag bag stuffed with pricey gears
‎While the real indies scrape through the years.
‎They bought up tracks from massive names
‎To license music for their games.
‎That budget definitely isn't small or slight
‎It shows their "indie" label's tight.
‎
‎Since 2023 Pizza Tower stands alone
‎The truest indie among many we ever known
‎No corporate lies, no golden shields
‎Just honest work in gaming fields
‎I’d rather play this awesome pixel prize
‎The single truth among the sugarcoating lies!
‎
‎"So yeah, gamer buddies! As I said before..."
‎
‎They dare claiming they the best, yet just a bunch of self-proclaimers. I'm leveling up the stats, leaving chat for all the gamers.
‎But the industry is broken, IT IS mostly run by the fakers! 
‎Paying cash under the table to the corporate taste-makers.
‎Dropping perfect 10 out of 10 by yours truly; IGN.
‎Fake scores, bought reviews, yeah, they lying again.
‎Honestly, this industry hype just offends.
‎Now I don't trust these quack critics, let the fake era ends.
‎Becoming smarter and won't follow the FOMO trends,
‎So I just boot up the PC and play Pizza Tower with my wiser friends.
‎
‎We choose the games that suit us best,
‎We cast aside the fake, forced test.
‎No traps will catch our gaming soul,
‎We play to feel completely whole.
‎
‎The freedom of the choice is ours,
‎We spend our independent hours.
‎The veteran players know the view,
‎Dividing propaganda from the true.
‎
‎So listen up, you gamers real,
‎Trust in the instincts that you feel.
‎Ignore the fakers standing by,
‎Who never really gave the game a try.
‎
‎We're done with bribes and reviews fake,
‎No more foul choices will we take.
‎We stand up tall and firmly say: 
‎"Bad devs, we will not walk your way."
‎
‎Look nowhere else, the path is clear,
‎Go play some Pizza Tower here.
‎An honest indie team that cares,
‎Pure fun and joy is all it shares.
‎
‎Pizza Tower is rated Teen, for players thirteen and up on screen. 
‎With frantic escapes and cartoon style, it makes the older gamers smile.
‎Expect quick punches, throws, and fights.
‎Through wacky, fast, and chaotically fun nights. 
‎Some crude humor, smoke, and brew.
‎Make it a choice for a mature crew. 
‎Like nineties shows with slapstick tone, it will hook you right in the zone. 
‎To keep it safe and fun for all, ensure they're old enough to call. 
‎By all of the right words firmly in place, this rhyme concludes with style and grace!
‎
‎(Mic drop. 'Nuff said...)
‎

The Noise.

In all seriousness, this game is nothing short of amazing. Incredible soundtrack, satisfying movement, and charming animations that never fail to get a chuckle out of me. Very few games have managed to hook me in as much as this one did. Highly recommend.

English: This game is awesome, tour de pizza cooked this tower shaped pizza very well, the style is so unique, and if you already beated the final boss there is still some stuff to do, like the max ranks, the achievements and clothes. 11/10, oh and let's not to forget about the soundtrack because it is peak!! one of the games with best OST i have seen. Note: Do not download mods!!! it took me 2 hours to set everything back to normal!!

Español: Este juego es asombroso, tour de pizza cocino muy bien esta pizza en forma de torra, el estilo es tan unico, y si ya derrotaste al boss fina aun quedan cosas por hacer, como los rangos maximos, los logros y las ropas. 11/10, oh, y vamos a no olvidarnos de la musica por que es clave!! uno de los juegos con de las mejores bandas sonoras. Nota: No descargues mods!! me tomo 2 horas poner todo de vuelta a la normalidad

While this game is pure wacky fun, I think the most fun you'll have with the game is P-ranking every level. There is nothing like carefully crafting a route through a new level and deciding what enemies are worth taking out, what points can be skipped to save time, that is where this game truly shines.
amazing game should consider buying  game amazing soundtrack

This is GENUINELY one of the BEST games i've played in a long time, possibly even ever. I would seriously recommend this to ANYONE looking for a fun faced paced platformer, or even if you just want to try something new. This game is worth DOUBLE the price and it's ONLY $20.

If you're looking for weird artwork, cartoon logic, fire music, and a good challenge, Pizza Tower is my first recommendation. Not only does this game give you the thrill of traveling at high speeds, but it feels extremely rewarding when you complete the level with a good rank. On top of that, this game has one of the best soundtracks I've ever heard. I don't think I ever stopped bopping my head while playing this game. (except the farm level. I hate that level with a burning passion.) This game is definitely worth buying.

Gameplay:9/10
Story:4/10(The game wouldnt work with a serious story but some context woul be nice)
Visuals:8.7/10
Audio:8/10
Creativity:11/10
Overall:9/10
Lenght:3-6 hours on first playthrough


The quick gameplay of this game is amazing.You can first more slowly go through the level to collect collectables and learn the layout.Then you have to go through the level again but with limited time and slightly changed layout.Its a really good gameplay loop.Somehow littteraly EVERY LEVEL has multiple new gimicks ranging from basic enemies to powerups.You NEVER know what to exspect and it never gets borring because of that.The controls are hard to get used to but  they are really fun once you get used to them.The art style no..style in general is also fantastic.Everything is so overexpressive and weird that it gives the game a unique charm in general.I also rreally like the bosses.They have very strict patterns sometimes but EVERY boss is unique creative and just as unpredictable(ideas) as the levels.

This game doesnt have a emotional story, tons of content or insane scenery but the ENTIRE game is consistently fun and extremely creative 
The rank gameplay also makes the game really replayable.
about the most ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ imagined game ive ever played, the uniqueness and goofiness of each level makes them all fun to play and keeps the game from feeling stale

Fair warning, this game's achievements can be rage-inducing at times. 100% at your own risk.

This is my first game that I have 100% completed. So Here's my tip of P Ranking:

Tip 1: Remember the layout of the level.
-Try to play the level again without needing a good rank
-Find places where enemies can spawn like Forknights (Cheeseslimes or any other enemies that don't hurt you anyway can be ignored)
-Find where the secrets are and the treasure room

Tip 2: See what the game will throw at you.
-The game will throw at you these things: New Enemies, New Transformations, New ways to get the requirements to P rank

Tip 3: REMEBER YOUR CONTROLS
-This is the most important one, not knowing one button will ruin your P rank. This goes for transformations as well since their is always a rat blocking your path.

Tip 4: Save your Super Taunt
-Taking some amounts of damage in your P rank run won't ruin anything, but once you get damaged make sure to recover quick by finding an enemy 1-5 feet away from you. If their is no enemies in front of you and is somewhere else on your screen USE IT. (Collecting toppings is an option but it won't recover it fully) 


These are my tips of I P ranked all levels, Bosses just follow their attack pattern (But not for The Noise or Pizza Face). Overall this was fun to 100%, one of my favorite games.

If you like fast paced platformer action, trust me, its not a waste. The gameplay is very adicting and there are so many mods that can easily run on low specs. So in conclusion, its a great game for low class pcs and laptops, recommending to buy it.

Pizza Tower might be my favorite game ever. 

I love platformers, but this is on another level; everything, the artstyle, the sound and music, the level design and mechanics, the player movement, the character design and expressiveness; it just clicks, at first, you might find yourself weirded out by how the game  works, as you might come from other platformers with "simpler" ideas, but once you get the hang of it, it all just comes natural. 

The adrenaline my surrenal gland released while playing this game was FELT. You can play the levels at your own pace, doing so is especially important if it's your first run through a level, but the REAL fun comes when, once you've mastered the level and got to know the level's layout; you go for your best run, aspiring for a P rank, the perfect run; nailing it down, or barely scraping through to get the rank you wanted, is the most fun ever.

Another thing I quite like are the challenges, checking off the achievements one by one and getting to know the game better than if you never had them to motivate you to do such stuff, gives the game quite a bit of replayability. The same thing goes for completition badges on your save files, playing the game a certain way will reward your save file with badges that made it worth for me to replay the game multiple times, improving my runs overall.

The length of the game itself is spot on, it doesn't drag for too long but isn't that short that you are left wanting more; even though, I'd really enjoy a sequel to this, even though I'm convinced it's practically impossible to recapture something like PIzza Tower is.

Overall, Pizza Tower is an amazing game, I advice anyone to try, even though platformers might not be your thing.
the bosses were really hard and the levels were really complex! I would give this a bad review but i had a blast playing this so 9/10 would recomend to others

I've been mulling this review over for 3 years now, simply because I can't find the best words to describe my love for this game. I adore the art style, the humor is on point, the soundtrack is legendary. But most of all, the feeling of mastering the moveset of Peppino and the Noise as well as the levels and entering a flow state where one action fluidly leads into another, all culminating in seeing that JUICY P-Rank at the very end is like nothing else in the world to me.

What are you waiting for? Play Pizza Tower! It's a one of a kind experience.
Thank you Tour de Pizza, for making my favorite single player game of all time,
This is one of my favorite games, despite my low playtime. I would 100% recommend this game to everyone.

I got really inspired by the art style of this game, where it became part of me, and my daily basis.
One time, I got clowned at school because I liked this game, due to a singular stupid meme that gave this game
a reputation where others cannot enjoy it, but only the ones who played it before the meme became a thing, ignored it.
But hey, this is where I changed into a new person, and drawing, and making more.
This game will always have a place in my heart, and will stay there forever.

If you're looking for a fast-paced platformer that gives you 1990s Cartoon Network vibes, this is the game for you. Every level is unique with different themes. The challenges aren't too complicated, and yet not too easy to the point of being boring.

One downside I will say is that unlocking some of the outfits is a lot more challenging than getting a perfect rating on each level and boss. 

But overall, Pizza Tower is a great game to play.
